findings.description: The source TOC lists 15 sections, but the knowledge file contains only 4 (s1–s4). The following 11 sections are absent from the knowledge file entirely: how_to_numbering_sequence, using_ThreadContext, using_TestDataParser, using_junit_annotation, using_transactions, using_ohter_class, how_to_assert_property_from_excel, tips_test_data, how_to_express_empty_line, how_to_change_master_data, how_to_change_test_data_dir.
